title: boehmeria japonica var. tenera
intro: Boehmeria japonica var. tenera, also known as Japanese nettle or Asiatic nettle, is a plant species within the Boehmeria genus that is native to East Asia. Boehmeria japonica var. tenera has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help to reduce swelling and promote wound healing. The plant is also believed to have various health benefits, including reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and alleviating symptoms of menopause. Boehmeria japonica var. tenera is often prepared as a decoction, tea, or tincture, and is also used in traditional herbal remedies to treat a range of ailments.
